problems.title: Two Sum
problems.description: Given an array of integers nums and an integer target, return indices of the two numbers such that they add up to target. Assume exactly one solution exists, and you may not use the same element twice.

problems.title: Group Anagrams
problems.description: Given an array of strings strs, group the anagrams together. You can return the answer in any order.

problems.title: Valid Palindrome
problems.description: Given a string s, return true if it is a palindrome, considering only alphanumeric characters and ignoring case.

problems.title: Container With Most Water
problems.description: Given n non-negative integers height[i] representing vertical lines, find two lines that together with the x-axis form a container that holds the most water.

problems.title: Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
problems.description: Given a string s, find the length of the longest substring without repeating characters.

problems.title: Valid Parentheses
problems.description: Given a string s containing just the characters '(', ')', '{', '}', '[' and ']', determine if the input string is valid (every opening bracket is closed by the same type in the correct order).

problems.title: Search in Rotated Sorted Array
problems.description: Given a rotated sorted array of distinct integers nums and a target value, return the index of target if it exists, otherwise -1. Must run in O(log n).

problems.title: Reverse Linked List
problems.description: Given the head of a singly linked list, reverse the list, and return the reversed list's head.

solutions.python:
def reverse_list(head):
    prev = None
    curr = head
    while curr:
        nxt = curr.next
        curr.next = prev
        prev = curr
        curr = nxt
    return prev

problems.title: Binary Tree Level Order Traversal
problems.description: Given the root of a binary tree, return the level order traversal of its nodes' values (i.e., from left to right, level by level).

problems.title: Kth Largest Element in an Array
problems.description: Given an integer array nums and an integer k, return the kth largest element in the array.

problems.title: Subsets
problems.description: Given an integer array nums of unique elements, return all possible subsets (the power set).

solutions.python:
def subsets(nums):
    result = []
    path = []
    def backtrack(start):
        result.append(path[:])
        for i in range(start, len(nums)):
            path.append(nums[i])
            backtrack(i + 1)
            path.pop()
    backtrack(0)
    return result

problems.title: Number of Islands
problems.description: Given an m x n 2D binary grid which represents a map of '1's (land) and '0's (water), return the number of islands (connected groups of '1's, horizontally or vertically).

problems.title: Coin Change
problems.description: You are given an integer array coins representing coin denominations and an integer amount. Return the fewest number of coins needed to make up that amount. If impossible, return -1.

problems.title: Merge Intervals
problems.description: Given an array of intervals where intervals[i] = [start_i, end_i], merge all overlapping intervals and return an array of the non-overlapping intervals covering all the input intervals.

problems.title: Implement Trie (Prefix Tree)
problems.description: Implement a trie with insert, search, and startsWith methods for efficient prefix-based string storage and lookup.

problems.title: Single Number
problems.description: Given a non-empty array of integers nums, every element appears twice except for one. Find that single one in O(n) time and O(1) space.
